'''tharama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beaconage|beaconage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beaconage|beaconage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tharama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæræmæth|thæræmæth]] || [[word:thæræmæj|thæræmæj]] || [[word:thæræmæsh|thæræmæsh]] || [[word:thæræmæ|thæræmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thararamath|thararamath]] || [[word:thararamaj|thararamaj]] || [[word:thararamash|thararamash]] || [[word:thararama|thararama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharamath|tharamath]] || [[word:tharamaj|tharamaj]] || [[word:tharamash|tharamash]] || [[word:tharama|tharama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharafmath|tharafmath]] || [[word:tharafmaj|tharafmaj]] || [[word:tharafmash|tharafmash]] || [[word:tharafmaf|tharafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tharamatha|tharamatha]] || [[word:tharamaja|tharamaja]] || [[word:tharamasha|tharamasha]] || [[word:tharamaka|tharamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tharamath|tharamath]] || [[word:tharamaj|tharamaj]] || [[word:tharamash|tharamash]] || [[word:tharama|tharama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tharamathal|tharamathal]] || [[word:tharamajal|tharamajal]] || [[word:tharamashal|tharamashal]] || [[word:tharamakal|tharamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tharamathatha|tharamathatha]] || [[word:tharamajaja|tharamajaja]] || [[word:tharamashasha|tharamashasha]] || [[word:tharamaka|tharamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tharamathan|tharamathan]] || [[word:tharamajan|tharamajan]] || [[word:tharamashan|tharamashan]] || [[word:tharamakan|tharamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tharamathaoro|tharamathaoro]] || [[word:tharamajaoro|tharamajaoro]] || [[word:tharamashaoro|tharamashaoro]] || [[word:tharamakaoro|tharamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
